extra.reason: Daemon bootstrap/JIT venv backend implemented and build-verified against Qt6 devkit + DAZ SDK6; Python daemon runtime-verified.
Pane shell + plugin registration implemented and verified (real configure+build against SDK4/Qt4, SDK6/Qt6, and standalone Core)

WorkerManager + worker_runtime implemented with lazy spawn, idle eviction, and restart-once-then-fail crash policy, verified by pytest (7/7 passing) using a real subprocess protocol. Deliberately decoupled from venv/zip layout (sop.3/.4) via an injected build_command callback so it isn't blocked on those landing first; sop.6 will wire it into the FastAPI /plugins endpoints.

ZipInstaller (miniz-backed, staged+atomic-rename) implemented and verified against 5 crafted zip fixtures (path traversal, symlink, oversized entry, and a lying-header zip bomb proving live byte-count enforcement) via a standalone C++ test harness, 17/17 assertions passing. Deliberately decoupled from token auth (sop.7) it's nominally blocked by, since extraction hardening doesn't depend on HTTP auth wiring.

Per-plugin venv isolation + eager dependency resolution implemented via PluginDependencyInstaller/PluginInstaller; verified conflicting-version coexistence and eager install-time failure with a real uv.
Implemented plugin registry + GET/POST /plugins daemon API, PluginStatusManager async poller, and DzPythonBridgePane status table/controls
Ported SecureRandom/AuthenticationService from daz-script-server for dazpythonbridge_token.txt; daemon enforces X-DPB-Token on /plugins* via daemon/auth.py, DSS outbound callers attach it
POST /run + inline_runner/inline_runtime + InlineRunner + pane Script-IDE section implemented and tested

ZipInstaller split into extractToStaging()/commit() so PluginInstaller can overwrite-by-id: stops the target's warm worker (best-effort HTTP POST /stop) before the file swap, swaps old/new dirs atomically, re-runs dependency resolution (fixed a real uv venv --clear bug found via testing), and emits reinstalled(id, oldVersion, newVersion). Covered by 3 new/updated manual C++ harnesses, all passing. Drag-and-drop UI to actually trigger/log this in DSS was never built by sop.3/.4 either -- still open, not unique to this issue.

All 9 child issues closed: daemon bootstrap, /run scripting pane, hardened zip installs, per-plugin venv isolation, warm worker lifecycle, plugin status UI, token auth, plugin pane shell, and reinstall/overwrite-by-id semantics.

Real SDK4 buildability, not just a link fix. Ported JsonStd.h (QVariant-based JSON, QJsonDocument on SDK6 / QtScript JS-eval fallback on SDK4) from daz-script-server; rewrote every QJson* call site in DazPythonBridgeCore across 5 files. Rewrote 25 new-style/lambda connect() calls to old-style SIGNAL()/SLOT() macros across 8 files (5 lambda QNetworkReply handlers became real slots using sender()/dynamic properties). Ported ~8 more Qt5-only APIs found only by actually building against the real SDK4 toolchain (QStringLiteral, QFileInfo::exists static, QProcess new-style API, QDir::removeRecursively, QRegularExpression, QStandardPaths, QUuid::WithoutBraces, a few QPlainTextEdit/QFontMetrics calls, plus a Q_ENUM->Q_ENUMS and QStringList init-list fix). Verified against real DAZ Studio SDK4 (Qt 4.8.1, moc.exe) and SDK6 devkits found on this machine: both DzPythonBridge.dll targets now build clean from a fresh configure. All 4 C++ harnesses and 49 pytest tests still pass.

Wired UvBootstrapper -> DaemonProcess -> DaemonHealthMonitor into DzPythonBridgePane; added daemon status label + log view; added DaemonProcess::logLine() streaming the daemon subprocess's stdout/stderr. Built and installed clean against both real SDK4 and SDK6 DAZ Studio installs; all C++ harnesses and pytest suite still pass.
